narrative:
Upper Sandusky City has 4,107 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.7 percentage points.
